import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define custom CUDA kernels inline
custom_conv2d_kernel = """
extern "C" __global__
void custom_conv2d_forward(const float *input, const float *weight, float *output, int N, int C_in, int H_in, int W_in, int C_out, int K_h, int K_w, int S_h, int S_w, int P_h, int P_w) {
    // Implementation of custom convolution forward kernel
}
"""

custom_matmul_kernel = """
extern "C" __global__
void custom_matmul_forward(const float *A, const float *B, float *C, int M, int K, int N) {
    // Implementation of custom matmul forward kernel
}
"""

custom_relu_kernel = """
extern "C" __global__
void custom_relu_forward(const float *input, float *output, int size) {
    // Implementation of custom ReLU forward kernel
}
"""

# Load custom CUDA kernels
custom_conv2d = load_inline(name="custom_conv2d", sources=[custom_conv2d_kernel], verbose=True)
custom_matmul = load_inline(name="custom_matmul", sources=[custom_matmul_kernel], verbose=True)
custom_relu = load_inline(name="custom_relu", sources=[custom_relu_kernel], verbose=True)

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_classes):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.conv1 = nn.Conv2d(1, 6, 5, 1)
        self.conv2 = nn.Conv2d(6, 16, 5, 1)
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(16 * 5 * 5, 120)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(120, 84)
        self.fc3 = nn.Linear(84, num_classes)

    def forward(self, x):
        x = custom_conv2d.forward(x, self.conv1.weight, self.conv1.bias, x.size(0), 1, 32, 32, 6, 5, 1, 1, 2, 2)
        x = custom_relu.forward(x, x.numel())
        x = F.max_pool2d(x, 2, 2)
        
        x = custom_conv2d.forward(x, self.conv2.weight, self.conv2.bias, x.size(0), 6, 14, 14, 16, 5, 1, 1, 2, 2)
        x = custom_relu.forward(x, x.numel())
        x = F.max_pool2d(x, 2, 2)
        
        x = x.view(-1, 16 * 5 * 5)
        
        x = custom_matmul.forward(x, self.fc1.weight.t(), self.fc1.bias, x.size(0), 16 * 5 * 5, 120)
        x = custom_relu.forward(x, x.numel())
        
        x = custom_matmul.forward(x, self.fc2.weight.t(), self.fc2.bias, x.size(0), 120, 84)
        x = custom_relu.forward(x, x.numel())
        
        x = custom_matmul.forward(x, self.fc3.weight.t(), self.fc3.bias, x.size(0), 84, num_classes)
        
        return x

def get_inputs():
    return [torch.rand(4096, 1, 32, 32)]

    return [20]

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size, divisor, pool_size, bias_shape, sum_dim):
        super(ModelNew, self).__init__()
        self.conv = nn.Conv3d(in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size)
        self.divisor = divisor
        self.max_pool = nn.MaxPool3d(pool_size)
        self.global_avg_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool3d((1, 1, 1))
        self.bias = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(bias_shape))
        self.sum_dim = sum_dim

    def forward(self, x):
        x = self.conv(x)
        x = x / self.divisor
        x = self.max_pool(x)
        x = self.global_avg_pool(x)
        x = x + self.bias
        x = torch.sum(x, dim=self.sum_dim)
        return x

def get_inputs():
    return [torch.rand(128, 8, 16, 64, 64)]

def get_init_inputs():
    return [8, 16, (3, 3, 3), 2.0, (2, 2, 2), (16, 1, 1, 1), 1]

    const int c = blockIdx.x;
    const int h_start = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;
    const int w_start = blockIdx.z * blockDim.z + threadIdx.z;

    if (c >= C_out || h_start >= H_in || w_start >= W_in) return;

    for (int k = 0; k < K; ++k) {

        const int w = w_start * S - P + k % W_in;
        if (h >= 0 && h < H_in && w >= 0 && w < W_in) {

    output[c * H_in * W_in + h_start * W_in + w_start] = max(0.0f, sum);
